## ⚠️ Important Disclaimers

- **This is a TESTNET only.** NexaRail has no public mainnet.
- **Testnet tokens have ZERO monetary value.** They cannot be sold, exchanged, or transferred for value.
- **This is NOT a token sale, investment, or financial opportunity.**
- **Live fund modules are disabled by default.**
- **Testnet state may be wiped at any time.**

By submitting this application, you confirm you have read and understood the above.

## Commitments

- [ ] I understand this is a TESTNET only. No mainnet is live.
- [ ] I understand testnet tokens have ZERO monetary value.
- [ ] I understand this is NOT a token sale or investment.
- [ ] I will run on a Linux host (not macOS Docker Desktop).
- [ ] I will maintain reasonable uptime and respond to coordinator communications.
- [ ] I understand testnet state may be wiped at any time.
- [ ] I will report security issues through the designated process.
- [ ] I will not make public claims about NXRL having monetary value.
- [ ] I agree to the NexaRail testnet code of conduct.
- [ ] I understand my validator can be removed via governance.
